summary: Frontend-only verification of three live-data fixes: (1) Market & Macro no-stale-mock, (2) Research full-universe search + direct-load fallback + live featured grid, (3) Discovery live-universe search. All 7 requested verification points PASS. 0 console errors across all flows.

verified_flows.flow: Login obaidtradez/Odm200429 via /auth/login (testids login-username-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button)
verified_flows.result: PASS — redirects to dashboard (/) after submit
PASS — index bar shows S&P 500 = 7,354.02 (live, well above the legacy mock 5,487). Body scan for '5,487' or '5487' returned FALSE on the page.

verified_flows.flow: Market & Macro — Key Macro Indicators table
verified_flows.result: PASS — rows render: Fed Funds Rate 3.63%, CPI Inflation 4.2%, Core PCE 3.4%, Unemployment 4.3%, Real GDP 2.1%, 10Y/2Y Treasury all populated

verified_flows.flow: Market & Macro — Sector Performance bar chart + Fed Funds History + Yield Curve charts
verified_flows.result: PASS — 25 SVG chart nodes rendered. Yield Curve shows 'Normal · 2Y→10Y spread +0.31%'. No crash, no white screen.

verified_flows.flow: Research /research — Featured Companies grid (no company selected)
verified_flows.result: PASS — 'FEATURED COMPANIES' heading shown; 8 cards render with distinct live tickers and prices (CRMD $7.85, EFOR $19.61, GLUE $22.29, BCRX $9.94, GMTL $15.11, WDFC $248.33, AAUC $23.07, LB $65.12). Not all-identical / not the old hardcoded 12-mock list.

verified_flows.flow: Research search small-cap CRMD via data-testid=research-search-input
verified_flows.result: PASS — debounce~1.5s; dropdown (data-testid=research-search-results) appears; data-testid=research-search-result-CRMD present, label 'CRMD CorMedix Inc. Healthcare $680M'. Clicking loads CorMedix research report with live price $7.85.
PASS — data-testid=research-search-result-PLTR present, label 'PLTR Palantir Technologies Inc. Technology $259.3B'

verified_flows.flow: Research direct-load fallback for non-matching ticker
verified_flows.result: PASS — typing 'ZZZQXX' (gibberish, no dropdown match) reveals data-testid=research-search-direct with text 'Load ZZZQXX directly →'

PASS — opportunities grid (data-testid=discovery-opportunities-grid) renders 120 cards by default; typing 'CRMD' in data-testid=discovery-search-input filters grid to exactly 1 card (CRMD); clearing the input restores the 120-card default. Search wiring works.

PASS — NVIDIA Corporation model loads, dcf-stat-bar shows Current $192.53 / DCF Implied $117.25 / Return -39.1% / EV $2.8T / TV 64% / WACC 16.5%, data-testid=dcf-price-asof shows 'Live data as of Jul 28, 12:07 AM', Recommendation: Buy

PASS — on /modeling without ticker, data-testid=dcf-company-search present; typing 'AAPL' surfaces Apple Inc. in dropdown; selecting it loads Apple Inc. model (Current $283.78, Implied $140.13, Recommendation: Not a Good Buy). Live data badge present.

verified_flows.flow: Console errors across all five pages
verified_flows.result: PASS — 0 console errors and 0 pageerror events observed during the entire test run

critical_code_review_comments: Market & Macro now correctly initializes indices=[] and renders only live data; no fallback to a stale literal anywhere on the page — confirmed by full body-text scan.

Research search wires through fetchCompanies({search}) against /api/universe/companies, hitting the full 3,090-company universe; the direct-load button is a great UX backstop for any ticker that misses the company-master search (e.g., new IPOs or symbol-only matches).
Discovery's debounced live search returns exactly the filtered set from the universe (1 result for 'CRMD'), and clearing the input restores the score-ranked top-120 — clean implementation.

Note: CRMD ranks 100 in the opportunity engine so it actually appears in the default top-120 grid as well; the live-search filter still demonstrably worked (120 → 1 → 120) so functionality is verified regardless of whether the typed ticker is also in the default set.

All required data-testid attributes from the review request are present and correctly wired: macro-live-badge, research-search-input, research-search-results, research-search-result-{TICKER}, research-search-direct, discovery-search-input, discovery-opportunities-grid, dcf-company-search, dcf-price-asof.
Reminder from prior iteration: Modeling.jsx is ~1600 lines and could be split into per-tab files for maintainability — not blocking.
test_credentials: obaidtradez / Odm200429 (works via /api/auth/access on POST {username, code})
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login route is /auth/login. Market live badge testid=macro-live-badge (text 'LIVE · FRED'). Research page: search input id=research-search-input (debounce ~1.5s), dropdown id=research-search-results, result buttons id=research-search-result-{TICKER}, direct-load fallback id=research-search-direct. Discovery page: search id=discovery-search-input, grid id=discovery-opportunities-grid (120 default cards). Modeling: dcf-company-search only renders when no ticker is selected — visit /modeling (no query) to test it; /modeling?ticker=XXX jumps straight to the model view (CompanySelector hidden).
rca of the issue: N/A — verification run; all three fixes (live S&P, live research search, live discovery search) confirmed working end-to-end in the UI.
